title: Break-even point
text: Break-even units are fixed cost divided by contribution margin per unit. Contribution margin is unit price minus variable cost.

title: DNN deep neural network
text: A deep neural network uses multiple dense layers to transform input features into predictions such as risk score or profitability probability.

title: AI-driven development RAG
text: RAG retrieves related context before generating an explanation. It separates calculation, evidence, and generated text.

title: Go goroutine inference
text: Go goroutines can calculate neurons in a dense layer concurrently. A WaitGroup keeps layer execution deterministic.

title: AGV analysis memo
text: This memo combines break-even analysis, AI-driven development, RAG, goroutines, and DNN inference for AGV profitability scenarios.
